positive: A whimsical, highly detailed, symmetrical illustration featuring a central, majestic neon crescent moon above a calm, starlit forest floor. The forest elements include bioluminescent mushrooms, glowing ivy, and small, fantastical woodland creatures (foxes, owls) integrated into the landscape. The aesthetic is 'Art Deco meets Naturecore,' utilizing deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and pops of glowing gold. High contrast, clean lines, bold silhouette work, vector graphic quality, suitable for screen printing or apparel transfer. Rule of thirds composition, flat lay style, detailed botanical cross-sections, graphic novel style, ethereal, dreamy, intricate.
negative: blur, low resolution, grainy, artifact, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, signature, text, watermark, logo, smudge, muted color, photographic, realistic photo, messy, busy background
